'''Bosken & Bosken''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] corporation that attempted to collect [[Gas/Legends|gases]] from the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Pesitiin]] several years before [[400 BBY/Legends|400 BBY]]<ref>''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref>. The corporation had built a floating mining outpost in the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] atmosphere but the colony failed to maintain a profit and was abandoned less than a decade after its construction.<ref>''[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin]]''</ref>
